title: Erdős–Gyárfás Conjecture
next_action: Attack the band-4 block rungs (L032 frame). (i) Strict: prove no vertex-taut C4-free 2-connected core (non-terminal degrees >=3, terminal degrees >=2) has S subseteq {4,5,6,7} — empty through order 14 (C031), with the L030 collapse machinery plus the terminal-degree->=2 leverage. (ii) Equality power: prove every vertex-taut C4-free 2-connected core with S subseteq {4,...,8} contains a C8 (at orders >=16, a C8 or C16) — the first genuinely power-specific rung, guided by Petersen-minus-e; candidate mechanism: two internally disjoint 4-paths force C8 outright, and pairwise-intersecting 4-path systems are rigid under C4-freeness. Search leg: extend the closed catalogue to order 15 under PyPy (a strict block kills (i); a C8-free equality block kills (ii) and enters the disproof protocol: check C16, lift, ring; also tests D14's predicted unique order-15 strict witness). Alternatives: minimal 1-atom structure theory; the band-5 equality analogue; order-16 census (deferred). Pivot triggers: strict block found; C8-free block found; both band-4 attacks stalling after honest effort.
